code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut token = ""
  mut in_tok = false
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        if idx % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(out)
            out = token
          else
            out = "#{out} #{token}"
          end
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        token = ""
        in_tok = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
